author: christianwannerstedt
description: An extended tags panel where tagged files can be easily viewed, filtered, and accessed.

manifest.author: Christian Wannerstedt
manifest.description: Adds an extended tags panel where tagged files can be overviewed, filtered and accessed in an easy way.
manifest.name: Tags Overview

name: Tags Overview

releases.description:
## What's Changed
Add support for custom filters through front matter properties

## Pull requests

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/christianwannerstedt/obsidian-tags-overview/compare/0.1.12...1.0.0

releases.author: christianwannerstedt
releases.description:
## What's Changed
- Made it possible to sort files on frontmatter properties
- Remember state for chosen *display type* and *display nested* option
- Updated readme

## Pull requests
* 15 select the sort order for columns in list view by @christianwannerstedt in https://github.com/christianwannerstedt/obsidian-tags-overview/pull/18
* Save display type setting on change by @christianwannerstedt in https://github.com/christianwannerstedt/obsidian-tags-overview/pull/17


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/christianwannerstedt/obsidian-tags-overview/compare/0.1.8...0.1.9

releases.description:
- Avoid duplicated tags per file
- Remove source map for styles

releases.author: christianwannerstedt
releases.description:
- Add namespace to css styling
- Add additional installation section to readme

releases.author: christianwannerstedt
releases.description:
Various improvements according to feedback from the submission to the official list of plugins PR.
- Store TaggedFiles in a map instead of an array 
- refactor modified and created info in TaggedFiles 
- Don't detach leaves on unload
- Listen to metadataCache changes instead of vault modify events

releases.author: christianwannerstedt
releases.description:
- Better leaf handling when view is activated
- Use moment lib from Obsidian

releases.author: christianwannerstedt
releases.description:
The first version of the **Tags overview** plugin.  
Adds an extended tags panel where tagged files can be overviewed, filtered and accessed in an easy way.
